titleStmt.title: SII 9.230: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 230. (A.R. No. 695 of 1919.) ON A SLAB LYING IN THE COURT-YARD OF THE BHIMESVARA TEMPLE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

summary.p: This is dated the 8th year of the reign of the Chaḷukya king Bhūlōkamalladēva, Ānanda, Āshāḍha, śu (?) amāvāsye, Sōmavāra, Vyatīpāta, Saṅkrānti, Sūrya-grahaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1134 July 23 Monday when there was a solar eclipse; Siṁhasaṅkrānti fell on the 28th of the month. His feudatory, the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Iruṅgōḷa-Chōḷamahārāja issued orders to the Mahāpradhāna Garuḍaseṭṭi to make a gift of 6 mattars of land, a flower garden, an oil-mill, and a house for the service of the god Bhīmēśvaradēva, set up by the Vaḍḍavyavāhari Bīviseṭṭi, son of Bāpuṭiseṭṭi and Bammikavve and for the feeding and clothing of the ascetics Kētarāśi and Mādhavarāśi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .These words are
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatu bhūlōkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipra
varddhamānamācaṁdrārkkātāraṁbaraṁ saluttamiralu . kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathā
vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi © svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsa
bda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīramāhēśvara(ṁ)noṟeyūrppuravarādhīśvara(ṁ)nujvaḷacōḷa kaligaḷaṁkusaṁ sā
mantagaruḍa nigaḷaṁkamalla bhītaraṁkolla khaḍgasahāya roddadagōva baṁṭarabāva saucagāṁgēya
maṁḍalaṁgāva duṭṭaragaṁḍa nāḷiṁmunniṟivanayyanasiṁga nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīma
nmahāma(ṁ)ṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ vīranoḷaṁba Iruṁgōḷacōḷamahārājaru śrīmatu bhūlōkama
llavarṣada 8 neyānaṁdasaṁvatsarada Āśāḍha śuddha Amavāse sōmavāra vyatīpāta saṁkrānti sū
ryyagrahaṇaparvvanimittavāgi tuṁgabhadrānadītīradalli siṁdavāḍi sāviradoḷagaṇa tammāḷke
ya bāḍaṁ Iṁdavaliya bāpuṭiseṭṭigaṁ bammikavvegaṁ puṭṭida suputrakula
dīpakaṁ gōtrapavitraṁ baṁdhujanakalpavrikṣaṁ guṇanidhinidhānaṁ satyaratu
nākaraṁ parāṁganāputraṁ śrībhīmēsvaradēvalabdhavaraprasādaṁ vaḍḍabeva
hāri bīviseṭṭiyaru māḍisida pratiṣThe dēvālya śrībhīmēśvaradēvara
pūjepunaskāranandādīvigenivēdyakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ Alliya
tapōdhanarkētarāsigaṁ mādhavarāsigaṁ Aśanācchādanakkaṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ
samastarājyabharanirūpitamahāmātyapadavīvirājamānamānō
maṁtrōtsāhaśaktitrayaguṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmadubhayarāya
nārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷagaruḍa saudharegaṁgoṁḍa garuḍiseṭṭiyargge besasa
la baḍaga benakarahaḷḷidiṁ baḍagalubhayarāyabeṁkoḷvanaṟuvattunālgēṇa gha
ḷeya bhūmi mattarāṟu Aṁkadiṁ mattarāṟu 6 hūdōṁṭa 1 maneya ni
vēśana 1 gāṇa 1 . Intī dharmmamanārōrvvaṁ pratipāḷisidargge gaṁgevāraṇāsiku
rukṣētradalu sāsira kavilegaḷumaṁ sāsirvva brāhmaṇargge dānaṁgeyda
phalamakku Intī dharmmamanārōrvvaru kiḍisidargge gaṁge vāraṇāsi ku
rukṣētradalu sāsira kavilegaḷa sāsirvvaru brāhmaṇarumaṁ
Aḷida pātakamakku . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō ha
rēti vasuṁdharāṁ śaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi
miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.230 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
